task_intents: assigning tasks to a specific team member
example_tasks: Update client contact details in CRM
Review candidate resume for developer role
Conduct user interview with beta tester
Assign task ownership to project lead
Create new user account for onboarding employee
Verify user permission levels in database
Send welcome email to new subscriber
Check team member availability for sync
reasoning: The icon combines a standard person silhouette with a vertical status bar or indicator. This makes it highly suitable for tasks involving specific individuals, user accounts, 1-on-1 meetings, or managing contact profiles, though the vertical bar adds a slight layer of ambiguity.
